name: Spiced Potatoes in Tamarind Sauce (Daum Aloo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve tamarind paste in 1 cup water. Let stand for 30 minutes.
2. Strain the mixture.
3. Boil potatoes until just tender, then cool completely and peel them.
4. Using a wooden skewer, pierce each potato in four places.
5. Heat oil in a heavy large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and cook until crisp and lightly browned, stirring frequently for about 10 minutes. Remove the onions from the skillet.
6. Add potatoes to the skillet and brown them well on all sides. Remove the potatoes from the skillet.
7. Pour off all but 1 tablespoon of oil from the skillet. Add ginger and garlic, and stir for 1 minute.
8. Stir in dried red pepper flakes and turmeric. Blend in 2 tablespoons water.
9. Mix in onion.
10. Add potatoes, tamarind liquid, and remaining 1-1/2 cups water. Stir in cardamom, fennel, cinnamon, and pepper.
11. Cover and simmer until the sauce has thickened slightly, about 15 minutes. Season with salt.
